name: PHP
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R $(whoami) . && sudo sed -i "s/xdebug.mode = debug/xdebug.mode = off/" /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/xdebug.ini && sudo sed -i "s/xdebug.start_with_request = yes/xdebug.start_with_request = trigger/" /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/xdebug.ini && composer install --no-interaction
